Ms. Stoneman reported that the signed verification is en route to her, that she will file it as soon as she receives it, that there are no objectors, that she has a signed consent from Alejandro Alvarez and requested a continuance. The Petition for Instructions was continued to July 6, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.
